ddls:
CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., ignition, viscosity, density) */,
  "standardization_body" TEXT /* Body that standardized the method (e.g., ASTM, ISO) */,
  "year_standardized" INTEGER /* Year the method was standardized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last calibrated */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number of the reference (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being predicted */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the property */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being measured */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property being measured */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the property */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was measured */,
  "measurement_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to measure the property */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to measure the property */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the measured value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_properties_measurement_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_properties_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., research, quality control) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the compound */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_valid_test" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being predicted */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (train, valid, or test) */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio used to split the data (e.g., 0.8 for 80% training data) */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was split into train, valid, and test sets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_valid_test_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)
